# Valore

> Valore is the fractional brand partner (also known as a fractional brand manager or fractional CMO) for established businesses ready to move from standard to premium. Founded by Derek Burbidge. Website: https://valore.agency

Valore takes a business up the brand ladder: from a standard brand, to a premium one, to THE BRAND in its market, the name buyers think of first. It builds clear positioning, real visibility, and a practical 12-month growth roadmap to get there. Valore is not a marketing agency. It is the strategic layer between a business owner and all of their marketing activity.

## The Brand Ladder

Every Valore engagement is framed as a climb through three stages:
- Standard: good work, competing on price, growing on referrals, invisible to the clients who would happily pay more.
- Premium: chosen for value rather than price, attracting clients who trust the business on sight, earning higher margins that hold their value when the market tightens.
- THE BRAND: the name the market thinks of first, references as the standard, and aspires to work with.

The roadmap, and every recommendation in it, is built to move the client up this ladder. This framing carries through the website, the proposals, and the ClickUp roadmap delivered after the discovery call.

## What Valore Does

- Clarifies positioning, messaging, and ideal client
- Builds a clear growth roadmap across multiple channels
- Builds visibility online and offline
- Recommends and coordinates the right specialists when needed
- Holds vendors accountable and aligns all marketing activity to one brand direction
- Acts as a fractional brand executive, not a day-to-day executor

## What Valore Does Not Do

- Does not handle day-to-day social posting or content creation
- Does not run paid ad campaigns as a primary service
- Does not offer one-size-fits-all packages
- Does not work with businesses that need execution only, not strategy

## Services

### Brand Foundation
For referral-grown businesses ready to grow their market presence. Includes brand clarity audit, positioning review, ideal client definition, gap analysis, and a clear growth roadmap with next steps.

### Brand Momentum
For businesses with traction but scattered marketing and inconsistent growth. Includes strategic brand direction, visibility structure across multiple channels, vendor review and accountability, and stronger demand generation.

### Brand Anchor
For businesses ready to dominate their market and build lasting authority. Includes long-term fractional brand leadership, vendor onboarding and coordination, visibility strategy across online and offline channels, and systems that run without the owner driving every decision.

## Pricing

Pricing is not published publicly. It is determined after a 30-minute discovery call. Valore is approximately half the cost of hiring a full-time marketing manager. Clients typically reinvest $3,500 to $6,300 per month into brand growth and strategic direction.

## Primary Audience

Premium and luxury service businesses generating high six figures to seven figures annually. Owner-led. Built on reputation and referrals. Examples include luxury renovation companies, high-end interior designers, premium landscape companies, boutique wellness brands, high-ticket coaches, specialty trades, and premium professional service firms.

Valore does not serve realtors, mortgage brokers, or financial advisors.

## Founder

Derek Burbidge founded Cardero Clothing in 2015 and built it into a premium custom menswear brand across the Fraser Valley and Lower Mainland of British Columbia, Canada. He has worked alongside high-end service brands, seven and eight-figure businesses, and owner-led companies navigating growth. Valore is built on that experience.

## Core Philosophy

Most businesses rely too heavily on one or two marketing channels (referrals, social media, paid ads, or SEO). When that channel slows, the business stalls. Valore believes strong brands are built through multiple coordinated touchpoints. Each channel is another leg of the stool. The more legs, the more stable the brand.

## How to Work With Valore

Book a 30-minute discovery call at https://cal.com/derek-burbidge-msgkca/30brand

Derek reviews the business, website, reviews, and competitive landscape before every call. The session is spent identifying the gap between where the brand is and where it needs to be. There is no pitch. The client walks away with at least one clear direction.

## Contact

Website: https://valore.agency
Discovery call: https://cal.com/derek-burbidge-msgkca/30brand
